user.title: Codex
user.description: Codex automatically detects the installed Codex CLI Worker app and its generated worker API token.

reauth_confirm.title: Codex
reauth_confirm.description: Reconnect to the installed Codex CLI Worker app.

reconfigure.title: Codex
reconfigure.description: Reconnect to the installed Codex CLI Worker app.

error.cannot_connect: Could not discover or connect to the Codex CLI Worker app. Make sure it is installed, started, and has generated its worker API token.
error.invalid_auth: The worker rejected its generated API token. Restart the Codex CLI Worker app and try again.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not discover or connect to the Codex CLI Worker app.
abort.unknown: The Codex config entry could not be found.

codex_not_signed_in.title: Codex is not signed in
codex_not_signed_in.description: The Codex worker is reachable, but Codex CLI is not signed in. Start the Codex sign-in flow from the add-on web UI or by running the `codex_cli.start_login` action.
